examples: Peony cigarettes, luxurious and high-graded, at a moderate price, are very popular with the salariat (wage-owners).
Most of the people in the world are salariat, and the millionaires are minority after all, then how can the salariat driver the luxury roadster in a short time?
As French writer Jean-Pierre Gaudard put it recently, we are witnessing the end of the salariat and judging by the presence of US casual labor everywhere, the US is taking the hardest hit.
